# Traffic Collector Module

<!-- Generated by tools/generate-python-reference-pages.py -->

The traffic collector runs a packet capture loop, parses tshark output into structured flow samples, and exposes a small health endpoint for the surrounding stack.

## Source Module

- Source file: [`CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py)
- Mirrored module for MkDocs: `docs_api.traffic_collector`
Companion deep-dive docs:

- [deployment-and-samples.md](../../deployment-and-samples.md)
- [system-overview.md](../../system-overview.md)

## HTTP Endpoints

These are the route checks implemented by the module's HTTP handler class.

| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| GET | `/healthz` | [`do_GET`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L317) | 317 |

## Key Architecture Entry Points

| Symbol | Kind | Line | Why It Matters |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`protocol_from_next_header`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L152) `(next_header, tcp_src, udp_src, icmp_type)` | function | 152 | Normalizes tshark transport fields into the collector's protocol label. |
| [`parse_tshark_line`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L173) `(line)` | function | 173 | Turns one tshark line into a structured flow sample. |
| [`tshark_command`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L212) `()` | function | 212 | Builds the tshark invocation used by the collector. |
| [`capture_loop`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L256) `()` | function | 256 | Owns the long-running tshark capture and ingestion loop. |
| [`Handler`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L301) | class | 301 | Implements the collector health endpoint. |
| [`main`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-traffic-collector/collector.py#L340) `()` | function | 340 | Starts the capture worker and HTTP service. |

## Mental Model By Concern

These groups are ordered to make the module easier to learn from left to right: input and helpers first, state and batching next, then the outer HTTP or runtime surface.

### Parsing And Normalization Helpers

Helpers that normalize tshark fields and turn raw lines into structured flow data.
